title: Sūtrakṛt-Gītā Per-Verse Object
description: The per-verse object schema for the substrate-rendered Bhagavad Gītā edition. Every verse's rendered output conforms to this schema. Anchor for the substrate-rendered edition's deliverable.

verse_id.description: BG verse identifier in chapter.verse form (e.g., '2.55' for Bhagavad Gītā chapter 2 verse 55).

devanāgarī.description: The verse text in Devanāgarī script, from the BORI critical edition.

iast.description: IAST (International Alphabet of Sanskrit Transliteration) romanization of the verse.

chant_audio_ref.description: Optional reference path to the verse's chant audio file in the appropriate meter.

addressed_to.description: To whom the verse is addressed, including any vocative forms.

word_by_word.description: Array of per-lemma analyses, one entry per content-bearing word in the verse.

surface_form.description: The word as it appears in the verse (post-sandhi-resolution).

lemma.description: The canonical lemma form, identified via vidyut-cheda lemmatization.

grammar.description: Grammatical analysis (e.g., 'nominative singular masculine', '3rd singular present indicative active').

senses_attested_in_panel.description: Ranked list of senses attested for this lemma across the commentator panel.

sense.description: Brief gloss of this sense, in English.

school.description: If the sense is school-specific, the school that attests it (advaita / viśiṣṭādvaita / dvaita / bhakti / yoga-aligned / etc.).

weight.description: Panel-evidence weight for this sense in this verse-context.

witnesses.description: Array of commentary-source identifiers that attest this sense for this lemma in this verse.

theme_lists.description: Theme-list identifiers this lemma participates in (e.g., 'sthitaprajña-lakṣaṇa', 'jñāna-yoga-marks').

intertextual_panel.description: Top-K Bhagavad Gītā verses ranked by the substrate's full score as candidate intertexts for this verse, with score decomposed by feature.

type.description: Substrate-classified type of intertextual relationship (e.g., 'definitional-elaboration', 'thematic-cluster continuation', 'echo at chapter-distance').

score.description: Composite substrate score for this candidate.

feature_breakdown.description: Decomposition of the composite score by individual substrate feature.

doctrinal_projections.description: Per-school reading projections, surfaced from the panel commentaries. Each school's projection is queryable independently.

meter_shift_from_previous.description: True if this verse's meter differs from the immediately preceding verse, signaling a topic transition.

meter_shift_to_next.description: True if the immediately following verse's meter differs from this one's.

meter_shifts_in_chapter.description: Verses in the same chapter where meter shifts occur, providing thematic-structure context.

vocative.description: Vocative used to address the listener (e.g., 'Pārtha', 'Bhārata', 'Kaunteya')

vocative_cluster.description: Description of the vocative's cluster pattern in the BG

preceding_question.description: If this verse is a response, the preceding question's verse-id and content

following_response.description: If this verse evokes a response, the following response's verse-id and content

theme_list_memberships.description: Theme-list memberships for this verse, identifying its role in each thematic cluster the substrate recognizes.

role.description: This verse's role within the theme-list.

other_verses_in_list.description: Other verses participating in this theme-list.

substrate_version.description: Version identifier of the Sūtrakṛt substrate used to render this verse (e.g., 'v2.6-frozen').

fitted_weights.description: The frozen weight values used by the substrate for this rendering.

corpus_provenance.description: Source corpora used in the rendering.

mūla.description: Source for the verse's mūla text (e.g., 'Belvalkar critical edition (BORI 1947)')

panel_witnesses.description: Identifier list of all commentator corpora consulted in producing this object.

extraction_date.description: Date the per-verse object was rendered.

score_methodology_documented_at.description: Reference to the published paper section documenting the substrate's scoring methodology (default: Paper-1 Section II).

reading_summary.description: Brief English summary of how this school reads the verse.

key_cross_references.description: Cross-reference verses that this school's reading particularly emphasizes for this verse.

witness_passages.description: Source-commentary passages that license this projection.

score.description: Confidence score for this school's projection at this verse, based on panel evidence density.
